parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "parent": { "database_id": "29f85f16-cf46-43a3-af3e-ac6c20bf56e1" },
  "properties": {
    "Ticket Key":     { "title": [{ "text": { "content": "{{ $json.key }}" } }] },
    "Summary":        { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{ $json.summary.substring(0, 2000) }}" } }] },
    "Type":           { "select": { "name": "{{ $json.tipo }}" } },
    "Current Status": { "select": { "name": "{{ $json.status }}" } },
    "Flow":           { "select": { "name": "{{ $json.responsable }}" } },
    "IT Flow?":       { "checkbox": {{ $json.responsable === 'IT' ? 'true' : 'false' }} },
    "Assignee":       { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{ $json.assignee }}" } }] },
    "Created Date":   { "date": { "start": "{{ $json.createdAt }}" } },
    "Last Updated":   { "date": { "start": "{{ $json.updatedAt }}" } },
    "Days in Current Status": { "number": 0 },
    "Jira URL":       { "url": "{{ $json.jiraUrl }}" },
    "{{ $json.enteredField }}": { "date": { "start": "{{ $json.today }}" } }
  }
}

nodes.name: Notion API — Create Ticket Row
nodes.notes: Creates a new row in SLA — Tickets MAIN (DB ID: 29f85f16-cf46-43a3-af3e-ac6c20bf56e1)

meta.description: Triggered by Jira webhook on issue creation in AM (MAIN) project. Creates a new row in SLA — Tickets MAIN.
